name: prescribe_formulary_benefits
description: Surfaces Surescripts formulary & benefits information as custom HTML inside the Prescribe, Refill, and Adjust Prescription commands once a medication is selected.

protocols.description: Kicks off a Surescripts eligibility request when a medication is selected in a prescribe-family command.
Receives the eligibility response and submits a benefits request for the chosen medication.
Receives the benefits response and renders the formulary/coverage detail as command custom HTML.
